moments.title: World Cup Final Recap
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 concluded on Sunday, July 19, with Spain defeating defending champions Argentina in the final at MetLife Stadium. Post Malone headlined the closing ceremony.

angles.name: Final Whistle Feels
angles.copy: Still buzzing from the World Cup Final? Spain clinched the trophy against Argentina on Sunday. What a tournament it was!

angles.name: Post Malone's Performance
angles.copy: Did you catch Post Malone at the World Cup closing ceremony? An epic end to a thrilling tournament!

angles.name: Spain vs Argentina
angles.copy: Spain are your 2026 World Cup champions! The final against Argentina was a classic. Where does it rank in your all-time great finals?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival is underway at Henham Park in Suffolk from Thursday, July 23 to Sunday, July 26, featuring headliners David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Festival Gates Open
angles.copy: It's Latitude Festival weekend! Henham Park is buzzing as the first acts take to the stage today. Who are you most excited to see?

angles.name: Headliner Hype
angles.copy: Lewis Capaldi, David Byrne, Teddy Swims... Latitude's lineup is stacked! If you're there, send us your highlights!

angles.name: Suffolk's Big Weekend
angles.copy: Latitude Festival brings the music and arts to Suffolk this weekend! Expect incredible performances and unforgettable moments.

moments.title: The Open Championship Concludes
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale, Southport, concluded on Sunday, July 19, with New Zealand's Ryan Fox winning the prestigious Claret Jug.

angles.name: Royal Birkdale Glory
angles.copy: What a finish at The Open Championship! Ryan Fox is your Champion Golfer of the Year after a thrilling final round at Royal Birkdale.

angles.name: Golf's Biggest Prize
angles.copy: The Claret Jug has a new home! Relive the drama from Southport as the 154th Open crowned its champion on Sunday.

moments.title: Love Island UK Heats Up
moments.blurb: Love Island UK Season 13, hosted by Maya Jama, continues nightly at 9pm on ITV2 and ITVX, with the highly anticipated finale expected around late July.

angles.name: Villa Drama
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of drama from the Love Island villa! Who's your favourite couple right now, and who do you think is heading for a fall?

angles.name: Maya Jama's Take
angles.copy: Maya Jama is guiding us through all the twists and turns of Love Island. What's been the most shocking moment of the season so far?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Slash
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses legendary guitarist Slash (Saul Hudson) celebrates his 61st birthday today, born July 23, 1965.

angles.name: Guitar Legend Turns 61
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to the one and only Slash! From 'Sweet Child o' Mine' to 'Paradise City', what's your favourite GNR riff?

angles.name: Rock Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Raise a glass for Slash, celebrating his 61st today! The top hat and Les Paul are timeless. What's his most iconic moment for you?

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez's Birthday
moments.blurb: American superstar Jennifer Lopez (J.Lo) will celebrate her 57th birthday tomorrow, July 24, 1969.

angles.name: J.Lo Turns 57
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Jennifer Lopez turns 57 tomorrow. What's your go-to J.Lo track to get the party started?

angles.name: Global Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: From 'Jenny from the Block' to global icon, Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday tomorrow. Share your favourite J.Lo song or movie moment!

moments.title: Mick Jagger's 83rd Birthday
moments.blurb: The Rolling Stones' iconic frontman Sir Mick Jagger will celebrate his 83rd birthday this Sunday, July 26, born in 1943.

angles.name: Rock Royalty Turns 83
angles.copy: Can you believe Mick Jagger turns 83 this Sunday? The energy, the moves, the hits! What's your favourite Rolling Stones anthem?

angles.name: Jagger's Enduring Legacy
angles.copy: 83 years young and still rocking! Sir Mick Jagger's birthday is Sunday. Celebrate with us by naming the ultimate Stones track!

moments.title: Kate Bush's 68th Birthday
moments.blurb: Pioneering English singer-songwriter Kate Bush will celebrate her 68th birthday next Thursday, July 30, born in 1958.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Kate Bush
angles.copy: Next Thursday, Kate Bush turns 68! From 'Wuthering Heights' to 'Running Up That Hill', her influence is immense. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Celebrating a Musical Visionary
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate a true original! Kate Bush's 68th birthday is next week. Which of her unique songs resonates most with you?

moments.title: UK Singles Chart Shake-Up
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean hold the UK Number 1 spot with 'Rein Me In' for a 17th total week. World Cup fever sees Oasis's 'Wonderwall' and Baddiel, Skinner & The Lightning Seeds' 'Three Lions' re-enter the Top 10, alongside Shakira & Burna Boy's official anthem 'Dai Dai' at Number 5.

angles.name: Chart Toppers Reign
angles.copy: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are still owning the Number 1 spot! But World Cup fever has brought some classics back into the Top 10. What are you streaming this week?

angles.name: Football's Chart Impact
angles.copy: 'Wonderwall' and 'Three Lions' back in the Top 10 after the World Cup! Plus, Shakira & Burna Boy hit Number 5. The power of football and music combined!

angles.name: New Music & Classics
angles.copy: From current hits to nostalgic anthems, the UK Singles Chart is a mix this week! What's your favourite re-entry?

moments.title: UK Summer Holidays In Full Swing
moments.blurb: Schools across the UK are now in or entering their main summer holiday period, with many families planning getaways and staycations.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: The summer holidays are officially here for many! Whether you're staying local or heading off on an adventure, enjoy the break!

angles.name: Summer Getaway Season
angles.copy: With schools breaking up, the great summer getaway is on! Are you planning a staycation or heading abroad this year?
